standard: EN 60715 TH35 top-hat rail, AutomationDirect DN-R35S slotted rail
description: A 35 x 7.5 mm slotted top-hat DIN rail segment with repeated 6.3 x 18.0 mm mounting slots and length-dependent slot count.
source: AutomationDirect DIN rail specification PDF, DN-R35S precut slotted rail table and drawing
